framework.name: No Post-Mortems Exist Because Production Is Still Shallow
framework.description: 64,098 GitHub issues across 18 major agent repos and 3,191 SO questions — and the taxonomy is still about installation, prompting, retrieval config, and single-hop orchestration. Zero evidence of multi-hop delegation failures because nobody is doing multi-hop delegation. The absence IS the data.
framework.raw_quote: much of the existing literature is based on author-driven experiences or controlled evaluations, rather than large-scale, developer-reported data

source.title: What Challenges Do Developers Face in AI Agent Systems? An Empirical ...
